last_cycle.reason: Fix MockWebSocket to work with vitest fake timers: mock needs to use vi.useFakeTimers() instead of native setTimeout. Rewrite the mock to be timer-aware. Keep the core nudge-client.ts implementation — only fix the test mock.

message_to_user: Nudge client has a real test issue — MockWebSocket incompatible with vitest fake timers. Sending back to fix the test mock, not the implementation.
